label.description: Display name for this category in the sidebar

sidebarPages.description: Ordered list of filenames (no extension) and subfolder names to display in the sidebar. When omitted, items are auto-discovered and sorted alphabetically. Pages not listed are still routable, just hidden from the sidebar.

strip.description: When true, this folder name is stripped from URL slugs

root.description: When true, promotes this category to a header tab. Only sidebar items within this folder are shown when the tab is active.
